# Chaos Mercenaries

#### Daemon Mercenaries

* 0-1 Beast of Nurgle (Cost: 5 Glory) NURGLE leader only  
* 0-1 Chaos Spawn (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Chaos Cult  
* 0-1 Daemon Prince (Cost: 7 Glory, or 8 for winged) Unavailable to Chaos Cult, Chaos Daemons  
* 0-2 total Summoned Daemons; Unavailable to Chaos Daemons  
  * Summoned Furie (Cost: 2 Glory)  
  * Summoned Bloodletter (Cost: 2 Glory)  
  * Summoned Daemonette (Cost: 2 Glory)  
  * Summoned Plaguebearer (Cost: 2 Glory)  
  * Summoned Blue Horror (Cost: 2 Glory)  
  * Summoned Pink Horror (Cost: 5 Glory) (counts as 2 choices)

#### Heretic Astartes Mercenaries

* 0-1 Black Legionnaire (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (no Variant, Alpha Legion, Iron Warriors, Night Lords, Word Bearers)  
* 0-1 Khorne Berserker (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (World Eaters), Vermintide, or SLAANESH leader  
* 0-1 Mutilator (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Noise Marine (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (Emperor’s Children), Vermintide, or KHORNE leader  
* 0-1 Obliterator (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Master of Possession (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (Alpha Legion, Night Lords, or World Eaters) or Vermintide  
* 0-1 Plague Marine (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (Death Guard), Vermintide (non-Plague Vermin), or TZEENTCH leader  
* 0-1 Rubric Marine (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Heretic Astartes (Thousand Sons), Vermintide, or NURGLE leader

#### Dark Mechanicum Mercenaries

* 0-1 Hell-Forge Heretek (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Negavolt Cultist (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Dark Mechanicum

#### Skaven Mercenaries

* 0-1 Grey Seer (Cost: 4 Glory) Vermintide Only  
* 0-1 Plague Priest (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to TZEENTCH leader or Heretic Astartes (Alpha Legion, Night Lords, or World Eaters)  
* 0-1 Rat Swarm (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Chaos Daemons, Heretic Astartes  
* 0-2 Skaven Rat (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Chaos Daemons, Heretic Astartes

#### Other Chaos Mercenaries

* 0-2 Blessed Blades (Cost: 5 Glory for the pair, 2 Glory to replace one)  
* 0-1 Chaos Ogryn (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Vermintide  
* 0-1 Cultist Firebrand (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Vermintide  
* 0-1 Fellgor Gorehorn (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-2 Mauler Hound (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Vermintide  
* 0-1 Unbound Daemonhost (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Unsanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Vermintide
